summary: Completed frontend testing of recap-outranked feature in Hero Card's 'Why this?' panel. All logic tests passed. Styling verified. Hero Card functionality intact.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: computeAllAttention() correctly adds recap-outranked factor when hero.prioritySource='live' AND different program has recapRank='top'
PASS: recap-outranked factor NOT added when hero.prioritySource='merged' (live + recap on same program)
PASS: recap-outranked factor NOT added when hero.prioritySource='recap' (no live urgency)
PASS: recap-outranked factor label includes actual school name: 'Recap suggested {school} — this is more urgent'
PASS: Styling verified - fontSize: 10px (vs 11px normal), fontStyle: italic, fontWeight: 400, color: rgba(165,148,249,0.50)
PASS: Dot styling verified - background: #a594f9, opacity: 0.5
PASS: Hero Card functionality intact - filter pills, carousel navigation, Why this? toggle, CTA button, peek row, progress rail all working
context_for_next_testing_agent: The recap-outranked feature is correctly implemented. Current data has Emory as both live-urgent hero AND recap top priority, so prioritySource='merged' and no recap-outranked factor appears (correct behavior). To see the recap-outranked factor in production, need a scenario where: (1) hero has live urgency but NO recap priority on it, (2) a DIFFERENT program has recapRank='top'. Logic verified via unit-test style browser evaluation. Styling verified by injecting mock element.

verified_features.1_recap_outranked_logic_live_hero: PASS - Factor added when hero.prioritySource='live' and different program has recapRank='top'
verified_features.2_recap_outranked_logic_merged_hero: PASS - Factor NOT added when hero.prioritySource='merged'
verified_features.3_recap_outranked_logic_recap_hero: PASS - Factor NOT added when hero.prioritySource='recap'
verified_features.6_recap_outranked_styling_color: PASS - rgba(165,148,249,0.50) soft purple at 50% opacity
verified_features.8_hero_card_filter_pills: PASS - All, Urgent, Soon pills working

testing_notes.current_data_state: Emory University is hero with prioritySource='merged' (Overdue 3d + Top priority in Momentum Recap on same program)
testing_notes.why_recap_outranked_not_visible: The recap-outranked factor only appears when hero has prioritySource='live' (not 'merged' or 'recap') AND a DIFFERENT program has recapRank='top'. Current data has Emory as both live-urgent AND recap-top, so prioritySource='merged'.
testing_notes.verification_method: Used browser-based unit tests to verify logic, and DOM injection to verify styling renders correctly
